evidence_summary: [CH002_SC005] Purpose: The transition from Earthly setting to the cosmic inciting incident.

[CH002_SC005] Summary: Fleeing the cave into the Arizona night, the protagonist gazes at Mars. He feels an irresistible magnetic pull toward the red planet and is suddenly whisked away through space into darkness.
[CH002_SC005] Emotional arc: Fear to Fascination/Surrender to Transcendence.
[CH002_SC005] Coverage: Wide vistas of the desert under starlight Extreme Long Shots (Protagonist vs. Mars in sky) VFX-heavy transition (The "pull" and the jump into darkness)
[CH002_SC005] Continuity: The position of Mars in the sky; the visual texture of the "transportation" effect.
